nodes.title: Latent Switcher
widgets_values:
It's better "select 2" But what is it?

"Select 1" Empty Latent Image. Opens a clean page. You select the resolution.

"Select 2" uses the aspect ratio of Img1. AI like it for consistency. 

In other words, you are switching between "VAE encodes and empty latent".

nodes.title: Sam3 Text 2
widgets_values: You can enlarge the masked area if you wish.

nodes.title: Sam3 Text1
widgets_values: Write what you want to mask. For example, "Female hair" or the  "cake", "or woman's body" .If you say "woman's head," both the face and hair change.

nodes.title: Sam3 Text 2
widgets_values: New Easy-Sam3 Segmentation node. If you couldn't mask what you wanted with a single node, this node is also at your service. Leave it blank if you are not going to use it. Do not bypass it.

nodes.title: Person Mask
widgets_values:
* ıf you want to swap the face or head, use this and select "face and hair. (you can bypass it) If the head-to-body ratio is poor, bypass it. If the body and face color are problematic, consider the bypass or leave the prompt blank options."

If this node isn't working;  python_embeded\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade mediapipe protobuf google-cloud-videointelligence

* For clothe-outfit, disable face, hair, background, If you are changing outfits""  

* Select face,hair, body, clothes, accessories and disable background.

* Bypass for items,food etc.

widgets_values: leave this blank for the face/head swap as the best solution.

nodes.title: (down)Load SAM3 Model
widgets_values: It will download a 3GB model during the initial download. Don't forget to select your desired "device" cuda or cpu!

nodes.title: IMPORTANT!!! V1.1
widgets_values:
***HEAD OR FACE SWAP***

(in the person mask, select face,hair) 

"Prompt Sam3 text2; "The woman's head"
Prompt Sam3 Text1; "The woman's face"

You don't need to write anything in the prompt section.


If the head-to-body ratio is poor,or colour problem bypass person-mask node.


***OUTFIT SWAP***

In the person mask, Enable body,clothe and disable face, hair, background" 

Prompt Sam3 text2; "just type a dot ( because we can’t leave it blank ).
Prompt Sam3 text1; "just type a dot ( because we can’t leave it blank ) Do not bypass. Just blank.

"Style the person in image1, with every article of clothing in image2. In the final image, all the features of the clothes should be on the person in image1." 


***PERSON / BODY SWAP***

Now works better in more difficult positions

(in the person mask, select face,hair, body, clothes, accessories and disable background)

Prompt Sam3 text2; "Person-with-clothes"
Prompt Sam3 Text1; "body"

  "Transfer the woman's head, hair style and face from image2 to the masked area in image1. (((Match the head shape, hair style to the image in the source.))). Match the emotions and gaze from the image2. Keep everything else the same." 


* FOOD, ITEMS, THINGS SWAP

(Bypass PersonMask)

Specify what will be exchanged in Sam3 text2 and text1.

"Replace the masked subject with the image1. ((Match rotation and coloring to the image in the source image)). Keep everything else the same."

Neutralize all color casts.


*** FOR SPICY BODY PART REPLACEMENT***
use this lora 

https://civitai.com/models/2319552/nsfw-flux-klein-no-face-change

Breasts. 

(in the person mask, select body) 

Prompt Sam3 text2; "breasts"
Prompt Sam3 Text1; "chest"

"Replace the breasts in image2 with the woman in image1, including all its features."

Bottom

(in the person mask, select body) 

Prompt Sam3 text2; "lower-body"
Prompt Sam3 Text1; ""

"Replace the naked-buttocks in image2 with the woman's in image1, including all its features.."

Vulva

(in the person mask, select body)

Prompt Sam3 text2; "lower-body"
Prompt Sam3 Text1; ""

"Replace the lower-body in image2 with the woman's in image1, including all its features."
